title: Polyceratocarpus microtrichus
taxonomy: Polyceratocarpus microtrichus is a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to tropical Africa. Polyceratocarpus microtrichus is classified as a member of the genus Polyceratocarpus within the Apocynaceae family. The classification of Polyceratocarpus microtrichus places it in the order Gentianales. Its classification further categorizes it as a flowering plant within the angiosperm clade.
